word: G1250 - διακόσιοι - diakósioi - dee-ak-os'-ee-oy - Two hundred

sections.paragraph:
- Original: διακόσιοι

- Transliteration: Diakosioi

- Phonetic: dee-ak-os'-ee-oy

- Definition:

1. two hundred

- Origin: from G1364 and G1540

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G1364 and G1540; two hundred: - two hundred.
